params.name: Flask of Life
params.description:
On Sept 4, 8400 BC, Gaia used the Flask of Life to give birth to countless lives.
The Flask of Life is one of the treasures owned by the Earth Goddess, Gaia, which stores the seeds of all living things that can bear life and the life-giving spring water. It is thanks to this treasure that Gaia has given birth to countless creatures, bringing life to the once silent earth.
params.ss7:
Per 10,000 Fervor, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG+40
Fervor: 500000/500000
Protomon Snail assist DMG + 400 (Awakened)
